title: centaurea scabiosa var. coriacea
intro: Centaurea scabiosa var. coriacea, commonly known as the prickly scabious, is a flowering plant species in the aster family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and calm irritated skin. The plant's medicinal properties also contribute to its various health benefits, including its ability to alleviate symptoms of rheumatism, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Centaurea scabiosa var. coriacea is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
